summary: The diff shows partial updates to `frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx` around authentication state and query invalidation on credential login, but it does not provide evidence of any implemented “Sign out” controls or logout/clear flows for either Internet Identity or credential mode, nor evidence of clearing/invalidation behavior on sign-out.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a visible “Sign out” control on the /admin page that logs the current Internet Identity principal out by calling the existing Internet Identity context clear/logout function, returning the user to the admin sign-in screen.
missing_requirements.reason: Although `useInternetIdentity()` is destructured to include `clear`, the provided diff snippet contains no sign-out UI control and no handler invoking `clear()` or returning the UI to the Admin Access sign-in screen. No evidence is shown of clearing admin-scoped React Query data on sign-out either.

missing_requirements.requirement: When authenticated via credential-login mode on /admin, provide a “Sign out” control that clears only the credential-authenticated session state (username/password inputs, credential error/loading flags, and isCredentialAuthenticated) and returns the user to the admin sign-in options screen, with admin-scoped React Query data invalidated/cleared.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows credential-login state variables and query invalidation on successful credential login, but no sign-out control or sign-out handler is shown that resets credential state (username/password/error/loading/authenticated flag) and invalidates/clears admin-scoped React Query data upon sign-out.
